title.en: After a few breaths, the two lazy turtles had f...

content.en:
Boom Boom Boom !!!

Ye Tian's attacks continued to shatter the bodies of the lazy turtles, leaving them powerless to resist.

After a few breaths, the two lazy turtles had fallen to their deaths.

After killing the two lazy turtles, Ye Tian took their corpses.

In the territory of 6000, the lazy turtle is also very valuable, because some transformation methods are to integrate into the bloodline of the lazy tortoise, so many forces still like to buy the lazy tortoise.

Subsequently, Ye Tian took the thirteen Heavenly Chaos Realm Ruins Grass.

For him, this time the task of the Tianyang family was completed.

Then, Ye Tian focused on collecting all kinds of resources, and if he encountered the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruins Grass, he would still collect them.

And in order to prevent encountering the death-bound extradimensional forbidden area, which would cause the replica body to fall, so that the resources he found would be lost, he once again condensed a replica body and stayed where it was, and those resources were placed on the replica body.

That way, he doesn't have to worry about losing resources.

......

Time flies, and time passes.

During this period, there were gradually peak realm gods coming out of this treasure land, and some of them were hit hard and didn't dare to continue to stay, even if they didn't gather the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruins Grass, they had to come out. 20 At the very least, they can still take away a tenth of the resources.

And some of them barely collected ten Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grasses, but they didn't dare to continue exploring, so they came out.

And Ye Tian naturally waited until the time limit was about to expire before he came out.

Every time he stays in this treasure land, he can get more resources, so he naturally won't be in a hurry to come out.

"One hundred and thirty-three Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruins Grass!"

Ye Tian said secretly in his heart.

He also ran around, killing too many extradimensional creatures, and even the lazy turtle fell into his hands more than twenty heads.

And in addition to these Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass, he also obtained a huge amount of resources, and the value of these resources together is estimated to be more than five billion Galanbao coins.

"It's a pity that there is not enough time, otherwise I will get some more extradimensional resources, and maybe I will be able to gather the immortal golden pith that will refine my extradimensional power to the Dacheng realm. "

Ye Tian thought so.

Immediately, instead of looking for resources, he was ready to do something else.

......

"The time is almost up, I still have two Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grasses, if I can't find it again, I can only take one-tenth of the extra-dimensional resources, I'm not reconciled!"

Luo Xin said unwillingly.

Suddenly.

A figure appeared in front of him, and it was Ye Tian.

"Your Excellency needs the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass?"

Ye Tian asked.

Luo Xinjie God frowned, not knowing what Ye Tian was going to do.

Ye Tian continued: "I have extra Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass in my hand, if you lack Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass, you can exchange resources with me!"

"Really?"

Luo Xin asked excitedly.

"Naturally, it's true!" Ye Tian directly took out a stalk of Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass, which made Luo Xin's realm god completely unsuspicious.

"How many resources do you want?" asked Luo Xin.

"One-fifth of the extra-dimensional resources on your body, isn't that too much?" Ye Tian smiled.

"The Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass is not a precious thing, and it is also needed by the Tianyang Family, which makes it rare, but where is its value worth one-fifth of the extra-dimensional resources on my body!!" Luo Xin Realm God seemed to be a little reluctant.

Ye Tian said with a smile: "If you can't get together ten Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grasses, you can only take away one-tenth of the extra-dimensional resources, if you trade with me, you only need to pay one-fifth of the extra-dimensional resources, and you can also take away four-fifths!

After pondering for a long time, he finally made a decision.

"Okay, I'll make a deal. "

Luo Xinjie Shinto.

"Make an extradimensional vow, it's good for you and me. "

Ye Tian proposed. []

Soon, they all made an oath, and this was the transaction.

Due to the existence of the oath, Luo Xin Realm God couldn't lie, he only lacked two Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass, Ye Tian only gave him two Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass, and Luo Xin Realm God really gave Ye Tian one-fifth of the extradimensional resources.

"There aren't many extradimensional resources!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But other peak realm gods don't have the strength of him, so naturally they can't harvest much extra-dimensional resources, but he can find a peak realm god to trade, and the super dimensional resources he gets in the end are definitely a lot, maybe he can scrape together enough resources for himself.

In the following time, he was with one peak realm god after another.

It can be said that as long as there are no peak realm gods who have gathered the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass, almost all of them are willing to trade with him, and only a few peak realm gods are looking for death, wanting to intercept him, and directly seize the resources on his body and the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruins Grass, but he was killed in seconds.

Before you know it, the final time of the agreement has arrived.

this day.

Ye Tian came out of this treasure land, and he didn't leave any copy bodies behind.

After all, this treasure land is controlled by the Tianyang family, and the Tianyang family may have the ability to spy on the internal situation of the treasure land, in case it is found that another copy of his body is in this treasure land, it will not be good.

Therefore, he gave up the idea of continuing to collect resources and came out of this treasure land directly.

Wow!

In addition to Ye Tian's duplicate body, the other two replicated bodies were directly annihilated.

Beyond the treasure land.

The cation is still waiting here, Ye Tian saw the cation, and took out ten 547 Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass, and he completed the task, the half-step superdimensional realm powerhouses of the Tianyang family can't check the superdimensional resources on his body, and they must let Ye Tian take them all.

And after Ye Tian, another peak realm god came out, and he also gathered ten Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass.

"Strange, how can there be so many peak realm gods who have gathered ten extra-dimensional resources, could it be that there are a lot of Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass in this treasure land? But it's impossible, those peak realm gods who came out in advance didn't find any Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass!"

The cation is very confused.

But this is not the time to investigate this matter, but to send these Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass back to the Tianyang Family Headquarters.

The ancestor is about to be unable to hold on, but fortunately, the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass has almost been collected, and if this batch is added, it should be enough.

At present, the matter of saving the ancestors is the most important, as for other things, we will talk about it later.

......

Soon after.

Ye Tian was sent back by the Tianyang family.

But Ye Tian found that there were already many peak realm gods eyeing him.

These pinnacle realm gods are those pinnacle realm gods who traded with him, and he used the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass to obtain so many extra-dimensional resources from these pinnacle realm gods, they are absolutely unwilling!

At this moment, it is estimated that they will join forces to attack him.
